reviews.author: Andrew DeLeeuw
reviews.text: We visited this place after the Stone Park. I found this less beautiful and underwhelming in contrast. Entrance for two with golf cart was 120k VND. It is beautiful but more developed and therefore more crowded. It is much more accessible though. There is a small cafe to buy drinks as well.

reviews.author: Dave Hoang
reviews.text: Stood and grasped for air before the beauty of nature. The rocks, the waves, the ancient coral reefs… everything was beautiful. Only you should come early in the morning, or later in the afternoon because the sun here is no joke. Remember to put on your spf & bring your water (or buy it there) (and do not litter). Been here twice and never got bored of the view, the sound, the feeling this place brought me.

reviews.author: Kelvin Pham
reviews.text: Just an amazing place of interests. Must try if u took a trip to vinh hy bay. Rocks and beach came together created a magnificent view. Fresh air and sunshine made this place like heaven.

reviews.author: Norsa'adah
reviews.text: There is an entrance fee. We are taken to the climbing stairs by buggy. The winding road takes about 5 minutes. There are toilets and refreshments shops. The toilets are dirty. There are 34 steps to the top, the view the big flat coral at the beaches. It was a limitation for elderly and disabled.

reviews.author: 00 lovely
reviews.text: Must visit area in southern Nha trang I really enjoy this view and nature vibe, so amazing !

reviews.author: Tobias Trong
reviews.text: It's true to the name of "Hidden heaven of Ninh Thuan." Tourists should pay a visit to this destination. It's totally worthy!

reviews.author: S Tr
reviews.text: The place is very fascinating and has some history. The giant otter rock is surrounded by a coral beach. The land are full of beautiful amber-orange salt boulders. The trail through the salt boulders makes for a short and fun adventure, but be aware of slippery rocks when you reach the coast on the other side of the trail.

reviews.author: rooocky afeez86
reviews.text: It's amazing here.i think this place is underrated and one of hidden gems for tourist spot. U may fascinated with the scenic view of wave, coral, huge rock and environment surrounding this place. Need to be careful when you take a walk between rocks, ladder and bridge in here. You will amazed with its view. Recommended to come here

reviews.author: Sagar Jain
reviews.text: Scenic spot with so many great locations for taking photos… stay clear of pretty ladies who try really weird poses at crazy locations around the Hang Rai ;)

reviews.author: VO TU
reviews.text: Not only the sunrise, the beautiful romantic sunset scene of Hang Rai also fascinates visitors

reviews.author: Sanjubaba_20
reviews.text: It's natural and worthy place you must need to visit if you visit vinh hy bay.

reviews.author: Linh Tran
reviews.text: Very clean water. Seem to be the largest ancient coral in Vietnam.

reviews.author: Tuấn Vũ Trần
reviews.text: A nature wonder. So many different rock formation in one place. Should have brought some cold beer to chill in this view with my wife

reviews.author: Đức Anh Nguyễn
reviews.text: Pretty beautiful. Climbing the rocks is quite dangerous but the scenery is beautiful.

reviews.author: kien pham
reviews.text: Interesting place to visit. Not only beauty place but also you can see turtles which were rescured and care here. Luckily, you even can feed them.

reviews.author: 김찬욱
reviews.text: The beach rock sea is a nice view.

reviews.author: Thinh Le
reviews.text: Not much to see. It’s too sunny, mostly just rocks, and despite the name, there’s no cave.

reviews.author: Law Lawrence
reviews.text: Beautiful rocks reminded me of the moai statue in the Easter Island. It doesn't look like forming naturally.

reviews.author: Hoang Nguyen
reviews.text: Breath-taking place. Really recommend to try.

reviews.author: Nguyen Duc Nguyen
reviews.text: Fantasic! Worth to get pass the strong wind in February to get here!

reviews.author: Onuh Justus Izuchukwu (IZUNWAONU)
reviews.text: Beautiful Place to have an experience

reviews.author: Ed Pham
reviews.text: Should come to see the beauty of nature once

reviews.author: Nur Nazurah
reviews.text: Nice place to enjoy the wind and the sea view especially in windy season

reviews.author: Bryan Ho
reviews.text: This place have nothing to do or play, have some sigh seeing, taking pictures only

reviews.author: clif tran
reviews.text: Good place for pictures but you need to be careful: the rocks are sharp and you can hurt yourself!
